messages.content: Analyze dangerous mission keyframes for hazards.

message.content: {"agent":"vision","hazards":[{"type":"obstacle_blocks_nominal_route","severity":"high","confidence":0.84,"frame_ids":["frame_003"],"evidence":"A temporary crane blocks the nominal inspection corridor near waypoint 2."}],"route_observations":[{"frame_id":"frame_003","description":"The route remains passable only by moving east around the obstacle, adding detour distance.","confidence":0.7}],"uncertainties":["Exact obstacle clearance cannot be measured from the image alone."]}

hazards.evidence: A temporary crane blocks the nominal inspection corridor near waypoint 2.

route_observations.description: The route remains passable only by moving east around the obstacle, adding detour distance.
